{{Event Header|StS2 Luminous Choir.png}} {{E|Luminous Choir|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Reach into the Flesh}} {{TS|positive||Remove 2 cards from Deck.}} {{TS|negative||Add {{C|Spore Mind||2}} (curse) to Deck.}}
{{Frame|Offer Tribute}} {{TS|negative||Pay 99-149 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} == Dialogue ==
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit haunting, melodic tones that reverberate throughout your chest. You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, pulsing in rhythm with the fungal song.
{{Frame|Reach into the Flesh}}
You plunge your hand directly into the spongy tissue of the dominant mushroom to extract the relic within. The fungal network shudders at your intrusion, and your mind quivers in response.
{{Frame|Offer Tribute}}
Placing gold upon the spongy ground. The coins slowly sink as tendrils gently push the relic to the surface, allowing a clean retrieval.
